labor_samples.labor_description: Project Tile - 0-13x0-13 Porcelain Set Monolithic 1000SF or Less
Project Tile - Mosaic Sheet Backed Porcelain SAME Thickness as Adjacent Tiles 1000SF or Less
Project Wall Base - 4 inch Cove Base
Project Carpet - Carpet Tile All Monolithic or Ashlar Pattern

sundry_samples.notes: grey $15.95, white $17.95 for mosaic/backsplash. Skipped for large format tiles.
Prism 17lb bag ($32.58 base + $0.33 freight). Coverage from tile dims + 3/16 joint. Formula: 2.73*(W*L)/((W+L)*J*T)
grey $15.95, white $17.95 for mosaic/backsplash. Skipped for large format tiles.

checks.message: The deployed frontend and estimator engine are tied to a named Git build.
All active materials have a valid classification.
The labor catalog is loaded for active installation materials.
Every active installation material has positive labor evidence in the calculation or accepted proposal.
Every active price has a current or explicit source.
No material is both deleted and present in the accepted proposal.
Every active material is represented in the saved proposal.
Proposal quantities and prices match the current material source.
All deleted materials have an explicit reason.
All deleted bundles have an explicit reason.
All deleted labor lines have an explicit reason.
The proposal audit is current and matches the job source.
Every accepted bundle has a positive sell price.
The current proposal PDF is available and passes its audit gates.
Recorded source files, vendor evidence, and the proposal PDF pass their hash checks.
